title: Rate Limiter for REST API
instruction: Plan the implementation of a token-bucket rate limiter for a FastAPI REST service. It should limit requests per user (identified by API key), support configurable limits per endpoint, store state in Redis, and return 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded. The service currently has no rate limiting.
codebase_context:
```
# Project structure (Python/FastAPI)
app/
  main.py         # FastAPI app, 3 routers mounted
  routers/
    users.py      # CRUD for User model
    orders.py     # CRUD for Order model
    products.py   # CRUD for Product model
  models/
    user.py
    order.py
  deps.py         # FastAPI dependency injection: get_db(), get_current_user()
  config.py       # Settings loaded from env vars via pydantic-settings
requirements.txt  # fastapi, uvicorn, sqlalchemy, redis, pydantic-settings
```
